page: Microsoft Azure E192ids_v6 is an isolated virtual machine instance belonging to the Edsv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors, running under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 1832.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of approximately 9.54 GB per vCPU.

This instance includes a large local storage allocation of 11,339 GB and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The combination of high-capacity local disk space and dedicated compute resources supports workloads requiring substantial temporary storage and high-speed local read and write operations. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration, and no GPU accelerators are present on this server type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E192ids_v6 offers high resource density, combining massive memory capacity with a substantial local storage footprint on a single isolated host. This configuration minimizes the need for multi-node clustering for large datasets, though the lack of GPU acceleration limits its utility for hardware-accelerated machine learning. The hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, and data warehousing workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E192ids_v6 is an isolated virtual machine instance from the Edsv6 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server provides 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors. It features 1832.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.54 GB per vCPU. Storage capabilities include a substantial 11,339 GB local disk alongside Premium Storage compatibility, though it lacks GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high resource density of this instance makes it qualitatively cost-effective for consolidating large-scale databases and in-memory analytics onto a single isolated host. It is structured to support demanding workloads such as large relational databases, data warehousing, and intensive enterprise applications.

tagline: An isolated, memory-optimized virtual server featuring high-capacity local storage and dedicated compute resources for large-scale enterprise databases.
